data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Google employs a microservices architecture to handle diverse services and ensure scalability.
data.technical_spec: Services are deployed independently using Kubernetes, ensuring they can scale independently.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Sophisticated global load balancing to manage billions of requests efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes HTTP(S) load balancing with autoscaling and caching capabilities.

data.title: Data Center Optimization
data.description: State-of-the-art data centers optimized for energy efficiency and redundancy.
data.technical_spec: Uses custom-built servers and networking equipment housed for optimal energy consumption.

data.title: Containerized Infrastructure
data.description: Google uses containerization for rapid deployment and environment consistency.
data.technical_spec: Application containers orchestrated using Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE).

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Centralized API gateway to manage and secure API traffic.
data.technical_spec: API Gateway leveraged for authentication, quotas, and logging.
